name: Wex
subtitle: Variant Human · Rogue 4 / Cleric 8 / Monk 4 · Lvl 16
title: Wex

magic.desc: Invisibility & pass without trace 1×/short rest; see in magic darkness; advantage on Perception.

paras: Wex moves through Port Haven's underside like a shadow with a conscience — a smuggler and fixer turned moon-touched agent of Noxa, the twilight goddess.
Loyal to friends rather than ideals; haunted by a death he blames on his own mistake, and determined that it never happen again. Tell him he can't do something and it's as good as done.
He keeps a worn prayer book to Noxa, a sending stone for Shae of the Dusk House, and a knack for being exactly where the moonlight falls.

items.html: Variant Human — +1 to two abilities, an extra skill (Survival), and a level-1 Origin feat: Shadow Touched; Speed 30
Background: Criminal (Smuggler) — Deception & Stealth; Thieves' Tools, Gaming Set
Rogue 1: Expertise (Perception, Stealth), Sneak Attack (1d6), Thieves' Cant
Rogue 2: Cunning Action — Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a Bonus Action
Cleric 1 — Twilight Domain: Spellcasting (Wisdom); Eyes of Night (300-ft darkvision), Vigilant Blessing; domain spells
Cleric 2: Channel Divinity — Twilight Sanctuary & Turn Undead; Harness Divine Power
Cleric 3: 2nd-level spell slots
Ability Score Improvement → Resilient (Wisdom) — +1 Wis and proficiency in Wisdom saves
Cleric 5: Destroy Undead (CR ½); 3rd-level spell slots
Cleric 6 — Twilight: Steps of Night (Bonus-Action fly speed in dim light/darkness); Channel Divinity 2×/rest
Monk 1: Martial Arts (d4), Unarmored Defense (10 + Dex + Wis)
Monk 2: Ki / Focus Points, Unarmored Movement (+10 ft)
Monk 3 — Way of Shadow: Shadow Arts (spend Ki for Darkness, Darkvision, Pass without Trace, Silence; gain Minor Illusion); Deflect Missiles
Ability Score Improvement — +2 Wisdom (→ 20)
Slow Fall — Reaction to reduce fall damage by 5× your monk level
Rogue 3 — Inquisitive: Insightful Fighting (Sneak Attack without Advantage), Eye for Detail, Ear for Deceit; Sneak Attack → 2d6
Steady Aim — Bonus Action for Advantage on your next attack (Speed 0)
Cleric 7: 4th-level spell slots
Cleric 8 — Twilight: Divine Strike — +1d8 radiant on a weapon hit, once per turn
Ability Score Improvement Dexterity (inferred)
Ability Score Improvement Dexterity → 18 (inferred)

noxascrescent.title: Noxa's Crescent
body: A crescent blade blessed by Noxa. Finesse — uses Dexterity. Melee or thrown 20/60.

Gains 1d6 force for every 20 ft you moved this turn; in moonlight, hits grant advantage on your next attack; once per turn you can cast Spiritual Weapon as a Bonus Action; grants proficiency in Undercommon.

veil.title: Veil of Dusk and Dawn
body: Once per short rest, become invisible and gain the effect of Pass without Trace.
+10 ft to your Twilight Sanctuary; you see normally in magical darkness; no Disadvantage to detect invisible creatures within 30 ft; advantage on all Perception checks.

sneakattack.title: Sneak Attack
body: Once per turn, deal an extra 2d6 when you hit with a finesse or ranged weapon and have Advantage, or an ally is adjacent to the target and you don't have Disadvantage.

cunningaction.title: Cunning Action
body: A Bonus Action each turn to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

steadyaim.title: Steady Aim
body: Bonus Action (if you haven't moved): Advantage on your next attack this turn; your speed becomes 0 until end of turn.

expertise.title: Expertise
body: Double your Proficiency Bonus for Perception and Stealth checks.

twilightsanctuary.title: Channel Divinity: Twilight Sanctuary
body: As an Action, a 30-ft sphere of dim light moves with you for 1 minute. When a creature ends its turn inside, grant it 1d6 + your cleric level temp HP, or end a charm/fright effect on it.

turnundead.title: Channel Divinity: Turn Undead
body: As an Action, undead within 30 ft that fail a Wisdom save are turned for 1 minute. Destroy Undead instantly destroys turned undead of CR 1/2 or lower.

eyesofnight.title: Eyes of Night
body: Darkvision out to 300 ft. You can share it with willing creatures (Wis-mod number) for 1 hour after a long rest.

vigilantblessing.title: Vigilant Blessing
body: As an Action, give yourself or another creature Advantage on the next Initiative roll. Lasts until your next rest or you use it again.

stepsofnight.title: Steps of Night
body: In dim light or darkness, as a Bonus Action gain a fly speed equal to your walking speed for 1 minute. Uses = Proficiency Bonus per long rest.

divinestrike.title: Divine Strike
body: Once per turn, a weapon hit deals an extra 1d8 radiant damage.

harnessdivine.title: Harness Divine Power
body: Bonus Action: expend a Channel Divinity use to regain one spell slot of level ≤ half your Proficiency Bonus (rounded up).

martialarts.title: Martial Arts
body: Use Dex for unarmed strikes and monk weapons; roll a d4 for their damage; one unarmed strike as a Bonus Action after the Attack action.

ki.title: Ki
body: Spend Ki to fuel Flurry of Blows (1 Ki — two unarmed strikes as a BA), Patient Defense (1 Ki — Dodge as a BA), or Step of the Wind (1 Ki — Dash/Disengage as a BA). Regain on a short or long rest.

shadowarts.title: Shadow Arts
body: Spend 2 Ki as an Action to cast Darkness, Darkvision, Pass without Trace, or Silence without material components. You also know Minor Illusion.

deflectmissiles.title: Deflect Missiles
body: Reaction when hit by a ranged weapon attack: reduce the damage by 1d10 + Dex + your monk level. If reduced to 0 and the missile is small enough, catch it; spend 1 Ki to throw it back (20/60).

unarmoredmovement.title: Unarmored Movement
body: +10 ft speed while not wearing armor or wielding a shield (already in your Speed).

slowfall.title: Slow Fall
body: Reaction when you fall: reduce the falling damage by 5 × your monk level.

shadowtouched.title: Shadow Touched (Origin Feat)
body: You learn Invisibility and a 1st-level Illusion/Necromancy spell (Disguise Self), each castable once per long rest without a slot (or with slots).

resilient.title: Resilient — Wisdom
body: Increase Wisdom by 1 and gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws.

umbrastep.title: Umbra Step (DM-bestowed)
body: Step through a moonlit shadow and emerge from another unobserved moonlit shadow within line of sight (120 ft) or tied to a strong memory. Counts as a 0-ft move; both shadows must be unobserved by non-allies.

insightfulfighting.title: Insightful Fighting
body: As a Bonus Action, make a Wisdom (Insight) check contested by the target's Charisma (Deception). On a success you can use Sneak Attack against that target even without Advantage (but not with Disadvantage) for 1 minute or until you use this on a different target.

eyefordetail.title: Eye for Detail
body: As a Bonus Action, make a Wisdom (Perception) check to spot a hidden creature or object, or an Intelligence (Investigation) check to uncover or decipher a clue.

eardeceit.title: Ear for Deceit
body: Whenever you make a Wisdom (Insight) check to determine whether a creature is lying, treat a roll of 7 or lower on the d20 as an 8.

grantsPool.label: Ki Points
grantsPool.reminder: Spend Ki: Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, Step of the Wind, or Shadow Arts (2).

grantsPool.label: Channel Divinity
grantsPool.reminder: Channel Divinity: Twilight Sanctuary, Turn Undead, or Harness Divine Power.

grantsPool.label: Steps of Night
grantsPool.reminder: Steps of Night: fly speed for 1 minute in dim light or darkness.

cantrips.name: Sacred Flame
cantrips.sub: Dex save DC 18 · 3d8 radiant · ignores cover

cantrips.name: Minor Illusion
cantrips.sub: Shadow Arts · a sound or image
